Featured

Code Annotation Fragments

A Reveal.js plugin that enables fragment-based keyboard navigation through code annotations in Quarto presentations.

Quarto Extensions Tuesday, the 14th of April, 2026

A11y

A Quarto Reveal.js plugin providing accessibility enhancements: skip navigation, focus indicators, reduced motion, high contrast mode, font and text-spacing controls, colour overlays, ARIA slide landmarks, and screen reader announcements.

Quarto Extensions Sunday, the 29th of March, 2026

Quarto Wizard

Quarto Wizard is a Visual Studio Code extension that assists you in managing Quarto projects.

Quarto Extensions Friday, the 15th of November, 2024

ggpacman

A `ggplot2` and `gganimate` version of Pac-Man.

R Packages Sunday, the 22nd of March, 2020

NACHO: NAnostring quality Control dasHbOard

A shiny-based dashboard to load, visualise and normalise the exported NanoString nCounter data and facilitates the user in performing a quality control.

R Packages Wednesday, the 13th of June, 2018

Quarto Extensions 32

  • Code Annotation Fragments

    A Reveal.js plugin that enables fragment-based keyboard navigation through code annotations in Quarto presentations.

    Tuesday, the 14th of April, 2026 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Reveal.js Code Annotations Fragments

  • Cascade

    A Quarto extension that automatically repeats the heading chain when new Reveal.js slides are created with `---`, following the DRY principle.

    Wednesday, the 8th of April, 2026 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Reveal.js Headings

  • Fragmention

    A Quarto filter extension that hoists `.fragment` attributes from empty marker spans to their parent list items in Reveal.js presentations, so bullets and numbers appear together with their content.

    Sunday, the 5th of April, 2026 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Reveal.js Fragments Lists

  • A11y

    A Quarto Reveal.js plugin providing accessibility enhancements: skip navigation, focus indicators, reduced motion, high contrast mode, font and text-spacing controls, colour overlays, ARIA slide landmarks, and screen reader announcements.

    Sunday, the 29th of March, 2026 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Reveal.js Accessibility A11y

  • Typst Render

    A Quarto filter extension that compiles Typst code blocks and inline expressions to images (PNG, SVG, PDF) using the Typst binary bundled with Quarto, making Typst output usable across all formats.

    Sunday, the 8th of March, 2026 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Typst Filter

  • Code Window

    A Quarto extension that adds window-style decorations (macOS traffic lights, Windows title bar buttons, or plain filename bars) to code blocks in HTML, Reveal.js, and Typst outputs.

    Friday, the 27th of February, 2026 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Code HTML Reveal.js Typst

  • Offcanvas

    A Quarto extension providing a simple way to create Bootstrap 5 offcanvas sliding panels in HTML documents.

    Sunday, the 30th of November, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Bootstrap Offcanvas HTML

  • Tabset

    Quarto extension enabling proper tabset navigation with keyboard controls and PDF export support for Reveal.js presentations

    Monday, the 24th of November, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Reveal.js Tabset Navigation

  • Remember

    An extension for Quarto to save and restore navigation position across page visits for both HTML documents and Reveal.js presentations.

    Thursday, the 30th of October, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension bookmark remember navigation-tracker

  • Collapse Output

    A Quarto extension that provides the ability to collapse code cell outputs in HTML documents using collapsible `

    ` elements.

    Thursday, the 9th of October, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Collapse Details Code Output

  • Git Link

    Use Git hosting platforms references (commits, issues, discussions, and pull requests) directly into your Quarto documents.

    Saturday, the 23rd of August, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Git Auto-link Short-link GitHub GitLab Bitbucket Gitea

  • Mickaël CANOUIL

    A Quarto extension that provides brand theming and styling for documents (HTML, Typst) and presentations (Reveal.js).

    Thursday, the 14th of August, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Brand Typst HTML Reveal.js

  • TOC Depth

    A Quarto extension that provides fine-grained control over table of contents depth at the header level.

    Wednesday, the 13th of August, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension TOC Depth Table of Contents

  • Modal

    A Quarto extension providing a simple way to create Bootstrap modals in your HTML documents.

    Sunday, the 27th of July, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Modal Bootstrap

  • External

    Quarto extension to include content or partial content from external file.

    Friday, the 25th of July, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Include External

  • Language Cell Decorator

    Quarto extension to add a decorator to the code cells to display the language name.

    Saturday, the 22nd of February, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Language Decorator

  • Div Reuse

    The power of "code/content reuse" for seamless and efficient content creation.

    Monday, the 3rd of February, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Code Reuse

  • Quarto Wizard

    Quarto Wizard is a Visual Studio Code extension that assists you in managing Quarto projects.

    Friday, the 15th of November, 2024 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Quarto Wizard Visual Studio Code Positron

  • GitHub

    Use GitHub short references (commits, issues, discussions, and pull request) directly into your Quarto documents.

    Sunday, the 14th of July, 2024 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension HTML Reveal.js LaTeX Typst Docx

  • Highlight-text

    Quarto extension that allows to highlight text in a document for various formats: HTML, LaTeX, Typst, and Docx.

    Friday, the 3rd of May, 2024 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension HTML Reveal.js LaTeX Typst Docx

  • Invoice (Typst)

    Quarto Typst template extension to make invoices.

    Friday, the 24th of November, 2023 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension HTML

  • Version Badge

    Badge is an extension for Quarto to provide a shortcode to display software version or anything as a badge.

    Tuesday, the 20th of June, 2023 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension HTML

  • Preview Colour

    A Quarto extension to add preview colour as a coloured symbol next to colour code.

    Thursday, the 15th of June, 2023 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension HTML Reveal.js LaTeX

  • Quarto Extensions

    A listing of Quarto extensions using GitHub API to retrieve information from the repositories.

    Wednesday, the 31st of May, 2023 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Listing Quarto Wizard

  • Spotlight

    A Quarto extension for `Reveal.js` allowing to highlight the current mouse position with a spotlight.

    Friday, the 10th of February, 2023 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Reveal.js

  • Lua Env

    `lua-env` is an extension for Quarto to provide access to LUA objects as metadata.

    Sunday, the 22nd of January, 2023 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension

  • Masonry

    A Quarto extension providing support to `Masonry.js`.

    Friday, the 28th of October, 2022 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension HTML

  • Elevator

    A Quarto extension providing support to `Elevator.js`.

    Monday, the 12th of September, 2022 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension HTML

  • Animate

    A Quarto extension providing support to `animate.css`.

    Saturday, the 3rd of September, 2022 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension HTML

  • Iconify

    A Quarto extension providing support to free and open source icons provided by **Iconify**.

    Saturday, the 13th of August, 2022 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension HTML

  • Storybook

    A old tale book style Quarto template extension for Reveal.js presentation.

    Wednesday, the 20th of July, 2022 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Format Reveal.js

  • Coeos

    A dark grey Quarto template extension for Reveal.js presentation.

    Wednesday, the 20th of July, 2022 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension Format Reveal.js

R Packages 5

  • ggpacman

    A `ggplot2` and `gganimate` version of Pac-Man.

    Sunday, the 22nd of March, 2020 Open repository →
    R package

  • umr1283: UMR 1283 - Project Template

    An R package to create the project structure within the Inserm U1283 / CNRS UMR 8199 unit.

    Friday, the 14th of February, 2020 Open repository →
    R package

  • insane: INsulin Secretion ANalysEr

    A user-friendly interface, using Shiny, to analyse glucose-stimulated insulin secretion (GSIS) assays in pancreatic beta cells or islets.

    Wednesday, the 13th of February, 2019 Open repository →
    R package

  • MiSTr: Mixed effects Score Test

    Test for association between a set of SNPS/genes and continuous or binary outcomes by including variant characteristic information and using (weighted) score statistics. `MiSTr` is an improvement of the [`MiST`](https://cran.r-project.org/package=MiST) outputs.

    Wednesday, the 13th of June, 2018 Open repository →
    R package

  • NACHO: NAnostring quality Control dasHbOard

    A shiny-based dashboard to load, visualise and normalise the exported NanoString nCounter data and facilitates the user in performing a quality control.

    Wednesday, the 13th of June, 2018 Open repository →
    R package

Tooling & GitHub Actions 2

  • Quarto Extensions Updater (GitHub Action)

    A GitHub Action that automatically updates Quarto extensions in your repository, similar to how Dependabot manages dependencies.

    Sunday, the 19th of October, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto Extension GitHub Action Quarto Wizard

  • Quarto Workflows

    Reusable GitHub Actions workflows to release Quarto extensions and deploy Reveal.js slides to GitHub Pages.

    Saturday, the 5th of April, 2025 Open repository →
    Quarto GitHub Action Reveal.js

Workshops & Courses 4

  • Shiny: First Steps (French)

    A one-day workshop on the R package shiny.

  • R Advanced Introduction (French)

    A 6-hours introduction workshop/course on objects and types in R.

  • R Packages

    A 30 minutes introduction to building R packages.

    Friday, the 31st of January, 2020 Open repository →

  • R and Databases (French)

    A two-days workshop on R and databases (+ web scraping).

  • R Lille

    R Lille is an R User Group (RUG) located in Lille, France. R Lille is part of the [Meetup](https://www.meetup.com/) RUG network sponsored by the [R Consortium](https://www.r-consortium.org/).

    Saturday, the 1st of February, 2020 Open repository →
